_comment: Coordination-probe hooks. Do NOT enable team-wide before consent (Research Proposal §10). To activate: merge this 'hooks' block into your .claude/settings.json (team-shared) or .claude/settings.local.json (just you). On machines where 'python' is not on PATH, change it to 'python3'. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is provided by Claude Code at runtime. The PostToolUse matcher below skips high-volume read/search tools; use ".*" to capture every tool call.
